title: Wire 5 orphaned review gates into requiredGates for Types 2+3
description: Five LaunchGate cases exist and appear in hello-world-google's JSON gates array but are not in any LaunchType.requiredGates: privacyReview, securityReview, designReview, accessibilityAudit, i18nReview. The proposed assignments (confirmed but not executed): Types 2+3 require all five; Type 1 requires privacyReview and securityReview; Type 0 requires securityReview. Update ReleaseOperationsModels.swift requiredGates switch, rebuild launch-calendar, verify evaluator shows correct verdicts.
